artPrompt: The dramatic instant a proud legendary figure is struck down in the midnight square, cold gold judgment-light lancing from the clock tower and shattering them into ash and smoke as ashen-robed onlookers point in grim vindication. A flurry of blank illegible memo-pages scatters on the wind. The falling figure anchors the lower frame, tower looming above. Wide 4:3 landscape, bone white and deep black, solemn dread, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: The Mayor Was Warned
text:
Destroy target legendary creature an opponent controls. We told the Mayor. We told everyone. Nobody listened.
If the destroyed creature was a Mayor or an Incumbent, put two doom counters on the Doomsday Clock and gain 4 life. Vindication is its own reward.
flavorText: Brother Eschaton sent forty memos. They were filed under "crank mail."

extras.interaction: removal aimed at rival commanders / the Mayor / incumbents
